title: RSW Santa’s Been Sleigh – Large Red Holder with ‘Merry Christmas’ Design – Reusable Cardboard Sleigh with Alphabet Stickers for Personalisation – 51cm
features: FESTIVE SANTA SLEIGH – Large red sleigh measuring approximately 51cm x 27cm x 29cm – perfect for displaying gifts under the Christmas tree
REUSABLE DESIGN – Made from sturdy card so it can be reused year after year for a magical Christmas tradition
PERSONALISABLE – Includes alphabet stickers to add names or festive messages for a personal touch
FLAT-PACKED FOR EASY STORAGE – Quick and simple to assemble with included instructions, then store flat after use
PERFECT FESTIVE CENTREPIECE – Adds excitement on Christmas morning and looks beautiful in family photos and displays
description: Product description Create magical Christmas mornings with the RSW Santa’s Been Sleigh – a charming way to display presents under the tree and delight children on Christmas Day. Made from sturdy card, this festive sleigh features a bright red finish, white “Merry Christmas” lettering, snowflake detail, and candy cane-style runners. Measuring approximately 51cm long, 27cm wide, and 29cm high when assembled, it offers plenty of space for gifts, stockings, and surprises. This flat-packed sleigh is easy to assemble following the included instructions and can be personalised with the set of alphabet stickers provided. Add children’s names or festive messages to make each Christmas unique and memorable. Once the celebrations are over, simply store the sleigh away to use year after year, making it an eco-friendly and cost-effective choice. Perfect for creating an enchanting display around the Christmas tree, this sleigh adds an extra touch of festive magic and helps build excitement for the big day. It’s ideal for families looking to make Christmas morning extra special and is a wonderful centrepiece for parties, photos, or seasonal décor. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not allow children to play on or near the assembled sleigh. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Adult assembly required. Not suitable for outdoor use.
